pr.title: Configure `auth-password` Edge Function for CORS-safe preflight and document deployment alignment
pr.body:
Login requests to `auth-password` were failing at CORS preflight when the function was deployed with JWT verification enabled or against a mismatched Supabase environment. This update aligns function runtime config and deployment guidance so `OPTIONS` can complete successfully in the intended project.

- **Supabase function runtime config (versioned)**
  - Added `supabase/config.toml` with project ref and function-level JWT policy:
    - `project_id = "selloqpcezuaiwpubgbz"`
    - `[functions.auth-password] verify_jwt = false`
  - This ensures preflight requests are not rejected before function code handles `OPTIONS`.

- **Operational guidance in README**
  - Added a focused section for `auth-password` deployment and CORS troubleshooting:
    - deploy in the correct project
    - deploy with `--no-verify-jwt`
    - verify `OPTIONS` returns HTTP 200 in function logs
    - confirm frontend `VITE_SUPABASE_URL` / `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` target the same environment
    - clear browser cache/service worker when validating

- **Illustrative config snippet**
  ```toml
  project_id = "selloqpcezuaiwpubgbz"

  [functions.auth-password]
  verify_jwt = false
  ```
pr.author: Copilot
